name: Overwhelm
official_rules_text: When a unit attacks with an Attack Pool that has 1 or more weapons with the Overwhelm keyword , if it spends at least 1 Aim token during the Reroll Dice step, the defending unit gains 1 Suppression token during the Assign Suppression Token to Defender step.
description: When a unit attacks with an Attack Pool that has 1 or more weapons with the Overwhelm keyword , if it spends at least 1 Aim token during the Reroll Dice step, the defending unit gains 1 Suppression token during the Assign Suppression Token to Defender step.
